name: design-loop
description: A self-triggered design self-learning loop (make -> check -> gate -> learn) for an HTML prototype.

scripts.test: node checks/test-state-taxonomy.mjs && node checks/doctrine-gate.mjs --strict && node checks/loop-integrity.mjs --strict && node checks/check-selfgrade.mjs --strict && node checks/test-craft-delta.mjs && node checks/craft-controls.mjs && node checks/rule-coverage.mjs --strict && node checks/design-rat.mjs --gate --strict && node checks/teach-gate.mjs --strict && node checks/test-show.mjs
